description: In GCompris's Digital Electronics activity, design and build a circuit that implements XOR (exclusive OR) logic using only basic gates: AND, OR, and NOT. Connect two switches as inputs (A and B) and one light bulb as output. The XOR behavior means the bulb should light up when exactly one input is ON, and stay off when both are ON or both are OFF. After building and verifying the circuit works correctly, save a screenshot of the working circuit (with one switch ON and one OFF, showing the bulb lit) to ~/Documents/xor_circuit.png.
